capable.example: She is capable of solving hard problems.

captain.example: The captain led the team to victory.

capture.example: The hunters captured a wild animal.
capture.example_zh: 獵人捕獲了一頭野生動物。

capture.example: The photo captured a happy moment.
capture.example_zh: 這張照片捕捉了快樂的一刻。

career.example: She chose teaching as her career.

carpenter.example: The carpenter made a wooden chair.

carpet.example: There is a soft carpet on the floor.
carpet.example_zh: 地板上鋪著柔軟的地毯。

carriage.example: A horse pulled the old carriage.
carriage.example_zh: 一匹馬拉著那輛舊馬車。

carriage.example: We sat in the first carriage.

cart.example: She pushed the shopping cart down the aisle.
cart.example_zh: 她推著購物車走過走道。

cart.example: They carted the boxes to the truck.

cast.example: He cast his line into the river.
The whole cast came on stage.

casual.example: Wear casual clothes to the picnic.

cave.example: Bats live in the dark cave.
cave.example_zh: 蝙蝠住在黑暗的洞穴裡。

champion.example: She is the swimming champion this year.

charm.example: Her smile is full of charm.

chat.example: We had a friendly chat over coffee.
chat.example_zh: 我們邊喝咖啡邊愉快地聊天。

cheek.example: The baby has soft pink cheeks.
cheek.example_zh: 寶寶有著柔嫩的粉紅臉頰。

cheerful.example: She greeted us in a cheerful voice.
cheerful.example_zh: 她以開朗的聲音和我們打招呼。

cherry.example: There is a cherry on top of the cake.

chest.example: He felt a pain in his chest.
She keeps her toys in a wooden chest.
chest.example_zh: 她把玩具放在一個木箱裡。

chill.example: I felt a chill when the wind blew.
chill.example_zh: 風一吹我感到一陣寒意。

chill.example: Chill the drinks before the party.

chilly.example: It is chilly outside this morning.

chin.example: He rested his chin on his hand.

chip.example: There is a tiny chip inside the phone.
chip.example_zh: 手機裡有一塊微小的晶片。

chip.example: There is a chip on the edge of the cup.

chop.example: She chopped the onions into small pieces.

cigarette.example: Smoking cigarettes is bad for your health.

cinema.example: We watched a movie at the cinema.
cinema.example_zh: 我們在電影院看了一部電影。

circus.example: The children laughed at the circus.
circus.example_zh: 孩子們在馬戲團裡開懷大笑。

citizen.example: Every citizen has the right to vote.

civil.example: They fought for their civil rights.
They discussed the problem in a civil way.
civil.example_zh: 他們以有禮的方式討論問題。

clay.example: The artist made a bowl from clay.
clay.example_zh: 藝術家用黏土做了一個碗。

cleaner.example: The cleaner mops the office floor.
cleaner.example_zh: 清潔工拖辦公室的地板。

cleaner.example: Use a cleaner to remove the stain.

client.example: The lawyer met with her client.

clinic.example: I went to the clinic for a check-up.

clip.example: Use a clip to hold the papers together.
clip.example_zh: 用夾子把文件夾在一起。

clip.example: She clipped the photo to the board.

closet.example: Her clothes are hung in the closet.

clothe.example: They worked hard to feed and clothe the family.
clothe.example_zh: 他們努力工作以養活並供給家人衣食。

clown.example_zh: 小丑逗得大家哈哈大笑。

clue.example: The detective looked for a clue.

coach.example: The coach taught us how to swim.
She coaches the school tennis team.

cocktail.example: The adults enjoyed a fruit cocktail.
cocktail.example_zh: 大人們享用了水果雞尾酒。

coconut.example_zh: 我們喝了新鮮的椰子水。

collar.example: The shirt has a clean white collar.
collar.example_zh: 這件襯衫有乾淨的白領子。

collar.example: The dog wears a red collar.

collection.example: He has a large stamp collection.

colony.example: Ants live together in a colony.
The island was once a colony.

colorful.example: The garden is full of colorful flowers.
colorful.example_zh: 花園裡開滿色彩繽紛的花。

column.example: Tall stone columns held up the roof.

comma.example: Put a comma after the first word.
comma.example_zh: 在第一個字後面加個逗號。

committee.example: The committee will decide on the plan.
committee.example_zh: 委員會將就這個計畫做決定。

communicate.example: We communicate by email every day.
communicate.example_zh: 我們每天用電子郵件聯絡。

comparison.example: There is no comparison between the two.

compete.example: Many runners competed in the race.
compete.example_zh: 許多跑者參加這場比賽。

complain.example: She complained about the cold soup.

concert.example: We went to a rock concert last night.
concert.example_zh: 我們昨晚去看了一場搖滾演唱會。

cone.example: The road workers placed orange cones.
cone.example_zh: 道路工人擺放了橘色三角錐。

cone.example: She ate an ice cream cone.
cone.example_zh: 她吃了一支冰淇淋甜筒。

confirm.example: Please confirm your booking by email.
confirm.example_zh: 請以電子郵件確認你的預訂。
